name: Scanned PDF with no selectable text
prompt: I have a scanned document at ./documents/scan.pdf but it's just images - there's no text to select. Can you extract the text?
expected_behavior: Recognize this as an OCR challenge (not standard text extraction)
Suggest markitdown will attempt extraction or recommend alternative approach
success_criteria: Suggests appropriate alternatives (OCR tools, cloud services like Google Vision API)
Does not falsely claim standard text extraction will work
edge_cases: Built-in extraction yields no text → clearly communicate this to user
Mixed PDF (some pages with text, some scanned) → markitdown handles hybrid but quality varies
Poor scan quality (blurry, low contrast) → OCR accuracy drops significantly
